items.title: Scientists found the hidden switch fueling alzheimer’s brain inflammation
items.summary: Scientists at Scripps Research have uncovered a molecular “switch” that appears to fuel the damaging brain inflammation seen in Alzheimer’s disease. They found that a protein called STING becomes chemically altered in a way that keeps the brain’s immune system stuck in overdrive, harming the connect

items.title: Why cancer spreads more in middle age than in old age
items.summary: Melanoma may not become steadily more dangerous with age as scientists once assumed. In a surprising discovery, researchers found that cancer spread was lowest in young mice, surged in middle-aged mice, and then dropped again in very old mice. The key appears to be a special type of immune cell that

items.title: Liječnici: Ako spavate u jednom položaju, odmah trebate prestati
items.summary: SPAVANJE sa savijenim rukama može uzrokovati trnce i bolove, a dugoročno i trajno oštećenje živaca.

items.title: Simulacija pokazala što se događa u tijelu nakon jedne limenke gaziranog pića
items.summary: SIMULACIJA je detaljno prikazala štetne učinke gaziranih pića.

items.title: Intermittent fasting triggers surprising changes in the brain
items.summary: Losing weight may involve rewiring the gut and the brain at the same time. In a study of obese adults, an intermittent fasting-style diet led to significant weight loss, healthier metabolic markers, and notable shifts in gut bacteria. items.title: Pet navika koje tiho uništavaju vaše zglobove nakon 50.
items.summary: REUMATOLOGINJA objašnjava koje životne navike, poput loše prehrane, stresa i sjedilačkog načina života, ubrzavaju osteoartritis te savjetuje vježbe niskog intenziteta za očuvanje zdravlja zglobova.

items.title: Omega-3 fish oil shows promise against type 2 diabetes
items.summary: A new study suggests fish oil may help reduce insulin resistance even in people who aren't obese. In diabetic rats, omega-3 supplementation improved blood sugar levels, cholesterol, and inflammation by shifting immune cells into a more anti-inflammatory mode.
